title: The Last Smith
description: A SlashBlade addon that has more blades and stories......
body:
## This is a story of a nameless swordsmith......

Welcome to The Last Smith.

This is a SlashBlade addon that adds more blades, more features and has a whole storyline about The Swordsmith.

Use your blades and fight with stronger enemies.

Enjoy your new blades, and new journey.

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21525b0c4eaa31cf6444effd005dd60df6ad1a0c_0.webp)
